axe_findings.title: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.
axe_findings.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. [Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.9/color-contrast).

items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.73 (foreground color: #767676, background color: #ffffff, font size: 16px, font weight: normal).

axe_findings.title: ARIA input fields do not have accessible names.
axe_findings.description: By default, only the visible label text for form fields is accessible. When using an ARIA role that designates form input, provide an accessible name. [Learn more about ARIA input field labels](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.9/aria-label).

items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty.
